hooks.command: FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /Users/fredericktsang/retailOs/pos-android/server-side/posterita-cloud/web && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(kt|java)$'; then cd /Users/fredericktsang/retailOs/pos-android && ./gradlew compileDebugKotlin 2>&1 | tail -15 || true; fi
